scenarios.description: child(1) on element with mixed nodes returns second element child (filters non-Element nodes, valid upper-bound index)
scenarios.precondition: parent element has text, element, text, element children in that order
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the second appended Element instance
pseudocode: TEST TC07 child on mixed nodes returns correct element

scenarios.description: child(0) on element with only text nodes throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (filtered list empty)
scenarios.path: B0→B1(childNodeSize>0)→B2(build list loop×2 yields empty)→B3(get index=0 out-of-bounds)→B5(exception)
scenarios.precondition: parent element has two TextNode children and no Element children
pseudocode: TEST TC08 child on text-only throws exception
